sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59911" key="krhsi/paida" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρησίπαιδα</orth> (fort. -<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πεδα</itype>)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">· ἐν Σαμιακῇ θυσίᾳ . . μέρη ἱερείων</foreign>, Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κρῆσσα</orth>, <sense id="n59911.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Κρής</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
